Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi Bus 405 Timings - Capital Park to Al Wathba Municipality

October 19, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

This route serves a range of residential, commercial, and institutional locations, offering convenient travel for both locals and visitors.

Operational Details

Bus 405 operates consistently throughout the day, providing frequent service between Capital Park and Al Wathba Municipality. The timetable ensures commuters have access to timely transport for work, shopping, and leisure. Below are the key departure times from both Capital Park and Al Wathba Municipality:

From Capital Park From Al Wathba Municipality
05:30 05:35
06:00 06:18
06:30 06:51
07:06 07:16
07:50 07:38
08:20 08:07
09:20 08:54
10:20 09:52
11:18 10:51
12:16 11:51
13:16 12:51
14:15 13:53
15:19 14:54
15:55 15:49
16:25 16:21
16:58 16:53
17:27 17:30
17:57 18:05
18:26 18:37
19:30 19:13
20:36 20:07
21:30 21:03
22:30 22:07
23:01  

Download PDF Bus 405

Bus 405 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website or click here for the 405 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Passengers can conveniently use the Hafilat Card to pay for Bus 405 trips, with a straightforward and affordable fare structure of AED 2 for travel within one zone and an additional AED 0.05 per kilometer for longer journeys; these cards can be easily topped up online or at kiosks across Abu Dhabi, ensuring a cashless travel experience.

Route Overview

Bus 405 connects the bustling urban core of Capital Park with the more suburban area of Al Wathba Municipality, passing through a variety of key locations. Below is a full list of the important stops along this route:

  1. Capital Park A peaceful park in the heart of Abu Dhabi.

2.

  1. Mariam Bint Said Mosque A spiritual landmark along the route.

  2. Abu Dhabi Bus Station A major transit hub.

  3. Mohamed Bin Khalifa Street A central location with access to many services.

  4. Al Jazeera Sports Club A favorite stop for sports enthusiasts.

  5. Al Maqta Bus Interchange · B A key transfer point.

  6. Abu Dhabi University A leading institution for higher education.

  7. Mafraq Dental Center Offering specialized healthcare services.

  8. Mafraq Hospital A crucial medical facility.

  9. New Al Mafraq Hospital Main Entrance The primary entrance for healthcare visitors.

  10. Rabie Al Qubaisi Mosque A peaceful mosque serving the local community.

  11. Souq A vibrant traditional market.

  12. K-haylan Street A quiet residential street.

  13. Saad Bin Obada School A school catering to the educational needs of the area.

  14. Atfal Al Emarat Kindergarten A key stop for families with children.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Civil Defense and Police Station Essential public service stops.

  2. Al Wathba Municipality The final destination, serving as the administrative hub for the area.

Some other Abu Dhabi bus routes you can check out include the A10 bus route, which runs from MBZ City Bus Station to Abu Dhabi Airport ECC, and the 222 route, passing through Osama Bin Zaid Mosque to Hili Street.

Accessibility and Services

The bus is equipped with:

  • Ramps for easy wheelchair access.

  • Designated seating for individuals with mobility challenges.
  • Audio-visual aids to assist passengers with hearing or vision impairments.

These features make Bus 405 an inclusive and comfortable option for everyone.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Throughout the journey, passengers on Bus 405 will have access to several attractions and important landmarks:

  1. Gold Center A hub for exquisite jewelry and local markets.

2.

  1. Abu Dhabi University A key educational landmark.

  2. Mafraq Hospital A crucial healthcare facility serving the area.

5.

Journey Experience

A trip on Route 405 from Capital Park to Al Wathba Municipality offers a scenic journey through Abu Dhabi, blending urban vibrancy with suburban tranquility. Starting at peaceful Capital Park, passengers admire the Gold Center, a jewelry haven, before stopping at the beautifully designed Mariam Bint Said Mosque. The bus then arrives at the bustling Abu Dhabi Bus Station and continues along Mohamed Bin Khalifa Street, lined with shops and eateries.

The Souq provides a glimpse of local culture with traditional vendors. Finally, the route concludes at Al Wathba Municipality, near the Al Wathba Wetland Reserve, showcasing the unique blend of culture and commerce that defines Abu Dhabi.

Travel Tips for Bus 405

  1. Plan Ahead: Check the bus schedule to avoid long waits, especially during peak hours.

  2. Use the Hafilat Card: Ensure your card is topped up for smooth, cashless travel.

  3. Real-Time Tracking: Download the AD Mobility app to track Bus 405 in real-time.

  4. Off-Peak Travel: Travel during non-peak times for a quieter and quicker journey.

Bus 405 offers a dependable, cost-effective, and accessible transportation solution for those traveling between Capital Park and Al Wathba Municipality. With its regular service and key stops, this route accommodates a diverse group of passengers, including students, professionals, families, and healthcare visitors.

Whether you’re commuting to work or exploring the city, Bus 405 guarantees a smooth and efficient journey through Abu Dhabi’s varied landscapes. Jump aboard Bus 405 and take advantage of the convenience provided by Abu Dhabi’s public transportation system! Be sure to explore the full range of bus routes available in the city for even more travel options!

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: October 19, 2025.
